post.description:
Browse for content: Music library (A), share(S:), Sonos playlists(SQ:), Sonos favorites(FV:2), radio stations(R:0/0), radio shows(R:0/1), queue(Q:)). Recommendation: Send one request, check the `TotalMatches` and - if necessary - do additional requests with higher `StartingIndex`. In case of duplicates only the first is returned! Example: albums with same title, even if artists are different

See [Browse](https://sonos.svrooij.io/services/content-directory#browse) in ContentDirectory for more details

post.description:
(Un-/)Mute the entire group

See [SetGroupMute](https://sonos.svrooij.io/services/group-rendering-control#setgroupmute) in GroupRenderingControl for more details

Change group volume. Players volume will be changed proportionally based on last snapshot

Relatively change group volume - returns final group volume. Players volume will be changed proportionally based on last snapshot

get.description:

get.description: Get a cached list of all sonos music services
Get a list off all music services that are enabled in Sonos Web
Get a music service by it's ID
Get login information from music service
Complete music service login
Get metadata or browse music service
Get the media metadata for a specific item

desiredFirstTrackNumberEnqueued.description: use `0` to add at the end or `1` to insert at the beginning

objectID.description: The search query, (`A:ARTIST` / `A:ALBUMARTIST` / `A:ALBUM` / `A:GENRE` / `A:COMPOSER` / `A:TRACKS` / `A:PLAYLISTS` / `FV:2` / `Q:`/ `R:0/0` / `R:0/1` / `S:` / `SQ:`) with optionally `:search+query` behind it.

filter.description: Which fields should be returned `*` for all.

requestedCount.description: Paging, number of items, maximum is 1,000. This parameter does NOT restrict the number of items being searched (filter) but only the number being returned. Using 0 is equivalent to 1,000

sortCriteria.description: Sort the results based on metadata fields. `+upnp:artist,+dc:title` for sorting on artist then on title.

newSleepTimerDuration.description: Time to stop after, as `hh:mm:ss` or empty string to cancel

roomUUID.description: The UUID of the speaker you want this alarm for

programMetaData.description: The sound metadata, can be empty string

includeLinkedZones.description: Should grouped players also play the alarm?

assignedID.description: The ID of the new alarm

newCoordinator.description: uuid of the new coordinator - must be in same group

rejoinGroup.description: Should former coordinator rejoin the group?

nameSpace.description: This is a trick to set the correct namespace on the desc element. Do not change the value!

eqType.description: Allowed values `DialogLevel` (string, 1–4 on supported devices: 1 = low, 2 = medium, 3 = high, 4 = max) / `SpeechEnhanceEnabled` (bool) / `MusicSurroundLevel` (-15/+15) / `NightMode` (bool) / `SubGain` (-10/+10) / `SurroundEnable` (bool) / `SurroundLevel` (-15/+15) / `SurroundMode` (0 = ambient, 1 = full) / `HeightChannelLevel` (-10/+10)

currentValue.description: Booleans return `1` / `0`; `DialogLevel` returns a string value representing the dialog intensity level, rest return number as specified

remainingSleepTimerDuration.description: Format hh:mm:ss or empty string if not set

htAudioIn.description: SPDIF input, `0` not connected / `2` stereo / `7` Dolby 2.0 / `18` dolby 5.1 / `21` not listening / `22` silence

id.description: The ID of the alarm see ListAlarms

roomUUID.description: The UUID of the speaker you want this alarm for

programMetaData.description: The sound metadata, can be empty string

includeLinkedZones.description: Should grouped players also play the alarm?

speed.description: Play speed usually 1, can be a fraction of 1

target.description: Position of track in queue (start at 1) or `hh:mm:ss` for `REL_TIME` or `+/-hh:mm:ss` for `TIME_DELTA`

currentURI.description: The new TransportURI - its a special SONOS format

currentURIMetaData.description: Track Metadata, see MetadataHelper.GuessTrack to guess based on track uri

eqType.description: Allowed values `DialogLevel` (string, 1–4 on supported devices: 1 = low, 2 = medium, 3 = high, 4 = max) / `SpeechEnhanceEnabled` (bool) / `MusicSurroundLevel` (-15/+15) / `NightMode` (bool) / `SubGain` (-10/+10) / `SurroundEnable` (bool) / `SurroundLevel` (-15/+15) / `SurroundMode` (0 = ambient, 1 = full) / `HeightChannelLevel` (-10/+10)

desiredValue.description: Booleans return `1` / `0`; `DialogLevel` returns a string value representing the dialog intensity levels, rest number as specified

variableName.description: The key for this variable, use something unique

transportUri.description:
The transport URI in the Sonos-specific format that identifies the media source to be played. This value cannot
            be null or empty.

metadata.description:
Optional metadata describing the media. If not specified, the system will attempt to infer the metadata
            automatically.

SetTransportUriRequest.description: Represents a request to set the transport URI and associated metadata for a media playback operation.

uuid.description: The unique identifier of the Sonos device.

name.description: The name of the Sonos device.

SonosDevice.description: Represents a Sonos device with a unique identifier and a name.

groupId.description: Gets or sets the unique identifier for the group associated with this entity.

isPlaying.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the media is currently playing.

muted.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the audio output is muted.

transportState.description: Current Transport State of the device, e.g. "PLAYING", "PAUSED_PLAYBACK", "STOPPED", etc.

currentTrackUri.description: Internal URI of the current track.

avTransportUri.description: Current transport URI, queue, input, etc.

nextTrackUri.description: Internal URI of the next track, if available.

SonosEvent.description: Object describing the current state of a Sonos device.

id.description: Sonos group id, will change if you change anything to this group

members.description: All the members in this group

SonosGroup.description: Sonos group, consisting of a coordinator and zero or more members

parentId.description: Parent ID, sometimes the playlist ID, but not always

class.description: Kind of music streamming, e.g. "object.item.audioItem.musicTrack" or "object.item.audioItem.podcastEpisode"

albumArtUri.description: Absolute or relative URI to the album art

tags.description: Tags of the song, not sure if ever used

streamContent.description: Stream content value, used for streaming tracks. Parsed to title and creator if those are empty.

serviceId.description: Id of the music service to switch to

mediaId.description: Id of the media item to switch to.

play.description: Start playback immediately after switching to the stream. If false, the stream will be loaded but not played until the user initiates playback.

SwitchToStreamRequest.description: Represents a request to switch to a specific media stream within a service.

id.description: The ID of the alarm see ListAlarms

roomUUID.description: The UUID of the speaker you want this alarm for

programMetaData.description: The sound metadata, can be empty string

includeLinkedZones.description: Should grouped players also play the alarm?
